bead.title: config: NewTestConfigForLoop constructor + opts struct + unit tests
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds NewTestConfigForLoop(opts TestLoopConfigOpts) *Config plus the explicit TestLoopConfigOpts struct. Constructor, not builder. Tests use this + Resolve to obtain ResolvedConfig — no shortcut to construct ResolvedConfig directly.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/config/testconfig.go (new) — exported so tests in cli/cmd/, cli/internal/agent/, cli/internal/server/ can import it
- cli/internal/config/testconfig_test.go (new)

Out-of-scope:
- NewTestConfigForRun / NewTestConfigForBead (Stage 2/3)

See TD-024 §Test config constructors.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestNewTestConfigForLoop ./internal/config/... passes: a test sets every TestLoopConfigOpts field, calls Resolve, asserts every loop-relevant accessor returns the configured value. cd cli && go doc ./internal/config NewTestConfigForLoop TestLoopConfigOpts returns non-empty.
